phaseGoal: 在独立 release 分支里补齐公开发布展示材料，让 GitHub Release 与社交平台介绍可以直接复用，同时不夸大当前 v0.1.0 的 Codex-only/web-first 边界。
deliverable: README Share/Demo section, GitHub Release copy, social post draft
stopCondition: release-facing copy exists, README links to it, claims stay aligned with v0.1.0 scope, and lightweight documentation verification passes.
